context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 complete. All 6 Final Polish & UX changes verified: (1) Categories now have 14 items with Pousada, Hotel, Petshop, Veterinário; (2) Categories order correct with Serviços/Varejo/Educação/Automotivo/Outros last; (3) WEEKDAYS uses full names Segunda/Terca/etc; (4) QR Modal persists result and X navigates to Meus QR; (5) MAX button below credit input; (6) Token purchase shows success alert on web; (7) Referral message updated. Client has 16 tokens and 3 credits for testing.
